Class HumanoidEntity

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
Gnome
public abstract class HumanoidEntity extends DumbEntity
Abstract base class for Humanoid custom entities.

Provides common properties and methods for all custom entities, such as ID, name, AI, and drop management.

Handles spawning, targeting, and death events, allowing subclasses to define specific behaviors and drops.

  • Field Details

    • skinData

      protected SkinData skinData
      The skin data for this humanoid entity, including texture and profile information. This is used to apply custom skins to the mannequin when it spawns.

  • Constructor Details

    • HumanoidEntity

      public HumanoidEntity(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, Class<? extends EntityAI> defaultAi)
      Creates a new HumanoidEntity instance with the given plugin, ID, and default AI. The entity type is set to MANNEQUIN and the name is set to null by default.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this entity
      id - A unique string identifier for this entity type
      defaultAi - The default AI class to be instantiated for this entity type when spawned

    • HumanoidEntity

      public HumanoidEntity(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, Class<? extends EntityAI> defaultAi)
      Creates a new HumanoidEntity instance with the given plugin, ID, and default AI. The entity type is set to MANNEQUIN.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this entity
      id - A unique string identifier for this entity type
      name - The custom name to display for this entity. Null by default for no custom name
      defaultAi - The default AI class to be instantiated for this entity type when spawned

  • Method Details

    • spawn

      public org.bukkit.entity.Mannequin spawn(org.bukkit.Location location)
      Applies skin, Adds AI and Spawns an instance of this custom entity at the given location. The spawned entity will have the custom name and ID set.
      Overrides:
      spawn in class DumbEntity
      Parameters:
      location - The location to spawn the entity at
      Returns:
      The spawned Bukkit Entity instance

    • getSkinData

      public SkinData getSkinData()
      Gets the skin data for this humanoid entity, which includes the texture and profile information used to apply custom skins to the mannequin when it spawns.
      Returns:
      The skin data for this humanoid entity

    • applySkin

      public void applySkin(org.bukkit.entity.Mannequin mannequin, SkinData skinData)
      Applies the given skin data to the provided mannequin entity, setting the appropriate profile and texture properties based on the skin data.
      Parameters:
      mannequin - The mannequin entity to apply the skin to
      skinData - The skin data containing the texture and profile information to apply

    • toValidProfileName

      protected static String toValidProfileName(String displayName, UUID fallbackId)
      Converts a display name into a valid Minecraft profile name, which must be 16 characters or fewer and can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores. If the display name is invalid or null, a fallback name based on the provided UUID will be generated.
      Parameters:
      displayName - The display name to convert into a valid profile name
      fallbackId - The UUID to use for generating a fallback profile name if the display name is invalid
      Returns:
      A valid profile name derived from the display name or a fallback name based on the UUID if the display name is invalid
